case_title: YUE CHANG TAN VS. RUTH CHEUNG ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF YUE CHANG TAN IS PRESENT WITH CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER AMY LO. DEFENDANTS TOM CHEUNG, HENRY CHEUNG DBA FOO WAH CHEUNG JEWLERY AND RUTH CHEUNG CHEUNG DBA FOO WAH CHEUNG JEWLERY ARE PRESENT CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER BANNIE CHOW. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, YUE CHANG ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2017 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY TAN, YUE CHANG AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG, RUTH DBA FOO WAH CHEUNG JEWLERY CHEUNG, TOM CHEUNG, HENRY DBA FOO WAH CHEUNG JEWELERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE: IFP) SERVED DEC-28-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG, HENRY DBA FOO WAH CHEUNG JEWELERY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED DEC-21-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG, RUTH DBA FOO WAH CHEUNG JEWLERY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, YUE CHANG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHEUNG, RUTH DBA FOO WAH CHEUNG JEWLERY CHEUNG, TOM CHEUNG, HENRY DBA FOO WAH CHEUNG JEWELERY PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS AGAINST RUTH CHEUNG DBA FOO WAH CHEUNG JEWELRY AND HENRY CHEUNG DBA FOO WAH JEWELRY ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT TOM CHEUNG REPLACED THE JAGE INTO THE PLAINTIFF'S PENDANT AND RETURNED THE PENDANT TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
